programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Selfie With Bajrangi
programme.desc: Ankush's life changes when he meets a mysterious nine-year-old child named Bajrangi, who is visible to nobody but him alone.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinchan Nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers and succeeds wildly, but only means the best. He just tries to have a good time.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinchan Nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers and succeeds wildly, but only means the best. He just tries to have a good time.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinchan Nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers and succeeds wildly, but only means the best. He just tries to have a good time.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Doraemon, a robot cat from the future, travels back in time to take care of a young boy named Nobita Nobi with the help of his futuristic gadgets.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Miss katkar punishes popat and asks him to clean the store room due to the chaos caused. However, while cleaning the store room, he gets coated in red paint.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey, Bunny, Popat and Zordaar look around for numerous ways to entertain themselves. Eventually, they are delighted when their master plans a trip to the forest.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinchan nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers (and succeeds wildly), but only means the best. he just tries to have a good time.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan is taken to a music school by Misae so he can learn music. However, the teacher of the institution leaves Misae upset.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae tries to realise her dreams of baking cookies with her child and Shin-chan prepares them in the shape of their faces.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: In order to make repairs on the broken pipe, Hiroshi climbs on to the roof. However, Shin-chan's incessant mischief causes him to lose his balance.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae tries a new approach to deal with Shin-chan and correct his behaviour by appreciating his mischief instead of berating him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi lets Shin-chan accompany him to the police station where he plans to renew his driving license. However, Shin-chan troubles an officer there.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi plans to train Shin-chan to become a baseball player. However, on the day of training, he forgets Shin-chan and takes Shiro with him instead.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan becomes sick, Misae buys medicine to help him get better and teaches him how to gargle. However, Shin-chan behaves mischievously.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Hiroshi and Shin-chan need a haircut, they visit a salon but Shin-chan annoys the barber with his mischief and causes her to quit.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan catches a cold, his mother Misae takes him to a clinic for treatment. However, once there, he pesters the doctor.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae has ordered a pizza but Shin-chan drops it and refrains from telling her. However, later when Misae eats it, she realises what happened.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae suffers from a backache, she visits a doctor for a diagnosis and Shin-chan accompanies her. However, Shin-chan annoys the doctor.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When a cockroach infests the house, Misae asks Shin-chan to help her be rid of it. However, misadventures ensue and the cockroach remains.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan visits the department store with his mother. However, once there, he wanders around and realises that he is lost.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan becomes sick, Misae buys medicine to help him get better and teaches him how to gargle. However, Shin-chan behaves mischievously.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan brushes his teeth with new toothpaste and eats unhealthy snacks right after. As a result, Misae is left infuriated and she berates him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: The students of the kindergarten are trained by Yoshinaga in properly executing the evacuation process in the event of a fire or some other calamity.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan begins a decent march at the Sports Day event but eventually he forgets his steps. Consequently, he ends up confounding the other students as well.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and his mother visit the station and await the arrival of the train. Later, Shin-chan forces Misae to take him to a washroom.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a complacent cat, finds his tranquil life of leisure disrupted by mischievous cockroaches who relentlessly raid his refrigerator and create pandemonium throughout his home.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Jack loses his brain in a toy mishap, allowing the roaches to steal it for their games.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy makes himself a nice cup of coffee, but just when he's about to drink it he starts to hiccup destructively and seemingly unstoppably.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: After being chased about, the cockroaches sniff a horrible odour. All eyes turn to Oggy, who must face the facts and take a bath.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy accidentally comes across the letters from his first love. Subsequently, he reads them with nostalgia, spied upon by the three smart alecs in the shadows.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy decides to go on a diet and empties his fridge of any delicious temptations that taunt him. However, how will the roaches react?

programme.title: Oggy And The Cockroaches: The Movie
programme.desc: The slapstick rivalry between Oggy and the cockroaches dates back to the dawn of time when they were microorganisms. Despite going through millennia of evolution, their relationship stays the same.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy arrives at the seaside on his scooter, ready for a lovely day of laziness, but the three cockroaches soon transform this dream-like beach into a battle zone.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy gets a box of chocolates for his birthday. But after the jealous cockroaches do everything they can to steal them, how will Oggy react?

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: The cockroaches take off with the key to Oggy's fridge and dash down to the centre of the Earth. Thus, Oggy decides to jump into the photocopy machine and make himself the size of the roaches.

programme.title: Shin Chan Movie-The Spy
programme.desc: When a girl named Lemon delivers a message to Shin-Chan, it sets off a chain of events leading him to trains as a special agent for a daring mission.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan watches a horror movie before his bedtime, he ends up getting frightened and sleeps with Hiroshi.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: In order to get some fuel, Hiroshi and Shin-chan visit a petrol pump where they meet Shinobu since she is employed there.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae has to step outside, Fumie helps with looking after Shin-chan. Whilst spending time together, Fumie teaches him mathematics.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan barges into the room of a college student to take shelter, she tries to evict him but incurs challenges along the way.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan brushes his teeth with new toothpaste and eats unhealthy snacks right after. As a result, Misae is left infuriated and she berates him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae punishes Shin-chan by making him stay outside, he sneaks in to watch Action Mask. Later, he hides to avoid being scolded by Misae.

programme.title: Shinchan Movie: Robot Dad
programme.desc: Shin-chan gets excited to see his father Hiroshi turn into a robot. However, he must fight other robots in order to help his father reclaim his original body.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae is followed by Shin-chan when she is on her way to the bank. Once there, Shin-chan annoys her and keeps her from withdrawing any cash.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Keiko opts to help Shin-chan take some photographs when he gets the chance to pose for a magazine advertisement. However, Shin-chan accidentally breaks her camera.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Shin-chan is accompanied by his friends to Nene-chan's house, her mother prepares a cake for them. However, Shin-chan's mischief ruins it.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae takes Shin-chan with her to see a movie. However, at the theatre, Shin-chan annoys everyone and consequently, he and Misae are asked to leave.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan barges into the room of a college student to take shelter, she tries to evict him but incurs challenges along the way.

programme.title: Shin Chan Movie - Villian Aur Dulhan
programme.desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

programme.title: Naruto: Shippuden
programme.desc: Naruto Uzumaki, a headstrong adolescent who seeks approval and acceptance, trains to overcome various challenges and become the village Hokage.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Bhatkati Pari creates illusions and diverts the demons to stop them from escaping. Further, after successfully sealing the gates of Danav Lok, Baalveer brings Meher home.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: When Meher finally returns home, she is extremely happy to meet her family members. Further, Tauba Tauba disguises himself as a rabbit and enters Meher's house in order to kill Baalveer.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: When a new student disrespects the teacher, Meher and her friends are shocked. Meanwhile, in Pari Lok, the fairies try to rescue Dooba Dooba.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Montu and his friends come up with a plan to lock Chaya, the new student, in a room. However, when she magically appears out of nowhere, Montu panics.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: When two men attempt to kidnap Meher, Baalveer comes to her rescue. Later, the children are excited as Baalveer takes up the role of Lord Krishna in their play.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: When Chaya Pari comes to meet Mahabhasm Pari, she reveals her plan to defeat Baalveer. Meanwhile, Baalveer arrives in Pari Lok and surprises the fairies with his attire.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: When Montu tells Baalveer about Chaya's behaviour, he decides to find the truth. Later, the children take the stage to perform a play about Lord Krishna's life.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: As the play continues, Chaya Pari uses her magic to swap places with Montu. Meanwhile, Mahabhasm Pari and Tauba Tauba eagerly wait for Chaya Pari to attack Baalveer.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal envisions being wished about getting married during his birthday celebration. However, he does want to be pitied so tries to avoid the celebration.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Despite all of Tapu Sena's efforts, Popatlal is determined to spend his birthday alone. Later, Popatlal hears everyone talking about an important issue.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide tries to get in touch with Popatlal through the society board. However, Popatlal is unreachable.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak tries to find Popatlal by talking to his boss. Soon, the Gokuldham residents realise there is more to Popatlal's absence than meets the eye.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal's friends mock him about his reluctance to donate to the elderly care facility. Later, he confides in Tapu, seeking solace from his grandson.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak reminds Jethalal to hand over the cheque to the old age home while Jethalal is busy with new customers at his shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal arrives at the bank in an effort to request a new cheque book. However, he remains clueless about the impending doom.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal panics after losing a payment receipt he claimed to have, scrambling to find a solution before Bapuji discovers the truth.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham Society is full of quirky neighbours who laugh, fight, and come together through every challenge. A mix of comedy, emotion, and strong community spirit.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal waits for Iyer to find the lost receipt while constantly fielding calls from Champaklal asking about it. Later, he panics when neither Bagha nor Nattu Kaka are answering his calls.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Under pressure from Champaklal's repeated calls, Jethalal rushes to his shop to find the lost receipt. But, on his way to the shop he ends up paying a fine.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu devises a scheme to create a fake receipt for Jethalal to present to Champaklal. But, they are also worried that Champaklal will uncover their deception.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Tapu's lie gets exposed when Nattu Kaka and Bagha arrive with another fake receipt for Champaklal. Now, Jethalal has to face an enraged Champaklal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal announces that he is departing for Bhachau as a punishment for Jethalal and Tapu. Later, Rupa arrives with a meal for the Gada family.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: After receiving an emergency call, the team arrives at an isolated area. Later, they attempt to locate Officer Shreya and the woman she is with.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: The team sets out to investigate the brutal murder of two friends, whose corpses are found in a forest after they trespass on private land with a third companion.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to decipher the meaning behind the thought written in Sanskrit. Meanwhile, Bagha brings good news for Jethalal in the morning.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds out that the profits of Gada Electronics have increased by fifty per cent over the past year. Meanwhile, Bagha rushes to meet Ba.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha gets worried as Bawri gets late for their date. He goes to Bawri's house to check on her but finds that her house is locked.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bawari's refusal to speak with Bagha leaves him disappointed. Later, Jethalal and Nattu Kaka hope to do something to cheer Bagha up.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is left anxious after he receives an order he might not be able to fulfil. Later, he considers seeking Taarak's help in finding a solution.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Bagha runs away from home and cannot be reached on his phone. Elsewhere, Jethalal has concerns of his own as he struggles to finish his orders on time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham Society are stunned when they witness Bagha's body language. Later, things get worse when he utters lines from popular movies.

programme.title: Kaun Banega Crorepati
programme.desc: Host Amitabh Bachchan asks a series of questions to several contestants to test their general knowledge and give them a chance to win a cash prize.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The chaos makes Bhide angry and he demands an explanation from Iyer, not knowing that he is the innocent one.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Inspector Pandey suddenly arrives at the scene and asks Jethalal to come to the police station, it surprises everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After an argument with Natu Kaka, Jethalal gets furious. However, things cool down when Jethalal meets Babita.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal hides while Bagha talks to Iyer and Babita, but a lizard scares him out of hiding. Iyer accuses Bagha of lying about Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in the society criticises Jethalal for his carelessness with Babita's phone. Taarak helps Jethalal arrange a meeting with the debt collectors.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal arranges a meeting with the debt recovery agents, hoping to retrieve Babita's phone. Sodhi prepares to confront the agents to get Babita's phone back.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Jethalal, Taarak, and Sodhi are arrested, they see that inspector Pandey is on duty, but he refuses to help them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Inspector Pandey locks up Jethalal, Taarak, and Sodhi in his station, prompting them repeatedly beg him to be lenient with them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal asks Inspector Pandey to drop off him, Taarak, and Sodhi at the society. Bapuji learns about Jethalal's arrest from Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal returns Babita's repaired phone, and Jethalal argues about exchanging the expensive shoes that Tapu had ordered.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and his friends encourage Champaklal to play pool with them. The Gokuldham Society women enjoy a day outside.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak gives a bag full of tomatoes to the garbage man. Sunita tells the Gokuldham residents why the price of vegetables has increased.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhavi reveals that she forgot to make a tomato pickle for one of her customers' orders. Bhide and Popatlal run into trouble.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide struggles to find enough tomatoes. However, he gets lucky when he sees a bunch of them at Gada Electronics.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide asks his uncle in Nashik to send over some tomatoes, and Jethalal informs Bhide of the bad news.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak explains why tomatoes have become so expensive in the market. Bhide's family spend some quality time together.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and Madhavi are thrilled when they get their hands on some tomatoes. However, their joy is short-lived.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide accuses Tapu and his friends of tampering with his tomatoes. However, Iyer suspects Jethalal instead.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Inspector Pandey suspects that someone from Golkuldham Society has stolen Bhide's tomatoes. Abdul catches someone running away and reports it to the police.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Inspector Pandey believes that Popatlal is the tomato thief and arrests him. However, Popatlal tells his side of the story to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhavi begins preparing tomato pickle for all her customers, but trouble arises when her gas cylinder runs out.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and his friends agree to help Bhide get a new cylinder for Madhavi in order to help deliver her pickles in time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha and Nattu Kaka press Jethalal to give them their salaries in advance. Tapu and his friends decide to skip the Independence Day celebrations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After learning that there is a big television order, Jethalal must handle it and find out about a mess in the delivery.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is in trouble after trying to set up a TV for Ronita. Jethalal calls Taarak for help. Bagha tells Bawri not to call him during work hours and come to Gada Electronics so frequently.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu spends his holiday playing cricket in Gokuldham, which leads to property damage that causes everyone frustration.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.desc: Everyone rejoices after they learn that Bhide left with his family. They decide to celebrate this and plan an outing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone rejoices after they learn that Bhide left with his family. They decide to celebrate this and plan an outing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide is running helter-skelter to find his beloved scooter, Sakharam. Taarak, Jethalal, Sodhi and Hathi try to pacify Bhid.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide gets angry with Popatlal for taking his scooter without permission; when Iyer refuses to leave Jethalal, he asks Babita to help him.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show - Masti Lagataar
programme.desc: The host, Kapil Sharma invites celebrities, Bipasha Basu and Karan Singh Grover, as they grace the show with their presence.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from 'The Kapil Sharma Show' celebrates top highlights, playful roasts and the vibrant energy that defines its comedy.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from the Kapil Sharma Show features the renowned comedian Kapil Sharma entertaining the audience with hilarious skits and interactions.

programme.title: Indian Idol
programme.desc: Various talented participants from India compete against each other during a singing competition in order to impress the judges and win the title.

programme.title: Crime Patrol: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The host presents dramatised re-enactments of crime cases and the vigilant attempts of the police department to solve the cases within 48 hours.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol Dial 100
programme.desc: A compilation of some of the most spine-chilling cases from 'Crime Patrol Dial 100', which investigates murders, kidnappings and thefts among other heinous crimes.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol Edit
programme.desc: Crime Patrol episodes demonstrate the stringent application of the law against criminal activities, highlighting the severe penalties imposed on offenders.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcase people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol Dial 100
programme.desc: Crime Patrol episodes demonstrate the stringent application of the law against criminal activities, highlighting the severe penalties imposed on offenders.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol Satark
programme.desc: A compilation of some of the most spine-chilling cases from 'Crime Patrol', which investigates murders, kidnappings and thefts among other heinous crimes.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Sai helps a son understand the significance of honouring his father's legacy. In the meantime, Jhipri tries to find work in the village.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Sai helps Jhipri as she is caught in a sticky situation while looking for work. Later, Jhipri's in-laws, who intend to malign Jhipri's image, arrive in Shirdi.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Tejasvi creates a scene in front of the villagers in a bid to ruin Jhipri's reputation. In the meantime, Jhipri's mother-in-law poisons the minds of Jhipri's neighbours.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: When Jhipri gets attacked by people from her community, Sai tries to save her. On the other hand, Kulkarni vows to teach a lesson to Jhipri.

programme.title: Sunrisers Hyderabad vs. Punjab Kings; TATA IPL 2025 Highlights
programme.desc: PBKS made 245/6 with Iyer scoring 82. SRH chased it in 18.3 overs, reaching 247/2 as Abhishek Sharma hit a stunning 141 off 55 balls. SRH won by 8 wickets in Hyderabad.

programme.title: Real Madrid - Manchester City; UEFA Champions League Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights and analysis of memorable moments and key plays executed by Europe's top football clubs at the UEFA Champions League.
